chunks.title: God's Omniscience
chunks.reason: A unified declaration of God's intimate knowledge of the psalmist's life and thoughts.

chunks.title: God's Omnipresence
chunks.reason: A rhetorical argument demonstrating that God's presence is inescapable regardless of location.

chunks.title: Creation and Providence
chunks.reason: A reflection on God's creative work in the womb and His foreknowledge of the psalmist's days.

chunks.title: Wrath Against Wickedness
chunks.reason: A passionate outburst expressing hatred toward those who oppose God and speak against Him.

chunks.title: Prayer for Examination
chunks.reason: A concluding prayer asking God to search the heart and guide the psalmist into the right path.
